历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4923 → 5875 → 7635 → 12158 → 9448, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, an abnormal high of 12158 occurred due to major group (04), rebounding to 9448 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the past two years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 34 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 34 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 45, an increase of about 32.4% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 42–46 range in recent years, belonging to top-tier finance and economics institutions. In 2023, reputation was slightly negative (decline in Journalism and Communication rankings), with no significant reputation events in 2026. Douyin popularity ranked 97th, rated as average, with low short video exposure. Applied Economics A, Theoretical Economics A-, both core finance and economics disciplines, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Finance/Financial/Economics majors was differentiated and wait-and-see, while Computer/Electronic Information majors were highly recommended. 预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment expansion of about 32.4% in 2026, and the slight increase in Physics Category examinees, based on the 2025 benchmark of 9448, the expansion effect dominates the increase in ranking numbers.
